data.title: test_missing_sg_gracefully_degrades fails on macOS bash 3.2 (declare -A)
data.description: Pre-existing: test-record-test-status-centrality.sh test_missing_sg_gracefully_degrades fails because the controlled test environment resolves to /bin/bash (3.2) which lacks declare -A support. Error at line 515 of record-test-status.sh.
